prompt: According to github, when was Regression added to the oldest closed numpy.polynomial issue that has the Regression label in MM/DD/YY?
actual_output:
Based on my analysis of the GitHub API, the oldest closed numpy.polynomial issue with the Regression label is issue #10881 ("Not working `rundocs()` in `numpy\\lib\\tests\\test_polynomial.py`").

According to the issue timeline, the Regression label was added to this issue on **04/15/18** (April 15, 2018 at 08:41:56Z).

The issue was created on 2018-04-11, and the Regression label (along with the "component: numpy.polynomial" label) was added on 2018-04-15 by mattip. The issue was subsequently closed on 2018-04-15.
